privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how Dikio Studio collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you use our website.

section1.title: 1. Data Controller
section1.content: The data controller is Dikio Studio, located at 6 rue de Saint-Pétersbourg, 75008 Paris, France.

section2.title: 2. Data Collected
section2.intro: We may collect the following data:
section2.item1: Identification data: name, surname, email address, phone number
section2.item2: Connection data: IP address, browser type, pages visited
section2.item3: Form data: information submitted through our contact or project forms

section3.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
section3.intro: Your data is collected for the following purposes:
section3.item1: Responding to your contact or quote requests
section3.item2: Managing client relationships and project tracking
section3.item3: Improving our services and user experience

section4.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
section4.intro: The processing of your data is based on:

section5.title: 5. Data Recipients
section5.content: Your personal data is intended solely for Dikio Studio and is never sold to third parties. It may be shared with our technical subcontractors (hosting, analytics tools) in strict compliance with GDPR.

section6.title: 6. Data Retention
section6.intro: Your data is retained for the period necessary for the purposes for which it was collected:
section6.item1: Client data: 5 years after the end of the business relationship
section6.item2: Prospecting data: 3 years from the last contact

section7.title: 7. Your Rights
section7.intro: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:
section7.access: Right of access: obtain confirmation that your data is being processed and request a copy
section7.rectification: Right to rectification: request correction of inaccurate data
section7.erasure: Right to erasure: request deletion of your data
section7.restriction: Right to restriction: request suspension of processing
section7.portability: Right to portability: receive your data in a structured format
section7.objection: Right to object: object to the processing of your data
section7.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at:

section8.title: 8. Cookies
section8.content: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze traffic. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings or our consent banner.

section9.title: 9. Security
section9.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction.

section10.title: 10. Changes
section10.content: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Any changes will be published on this page with an update date.

section11.title: 11. Contact and Complaints
section11.content: For any questions regarding this policy or your personal data, contact us at:
section11.cnil: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (French Data Protection Authority):

personalData.gdpr: In accordance with the 'Data Protection Act' and GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data. To exercise this right, contact us at:

seo.title: Archilo - The Legal Black Box
seo.description: A secure physical server installed at your firm, paired with expert-level AI. Your data stays with you. Sovereign infrastructure for lawyers.

hero.description: A secure physical server installed at your firm, paired with expert-level AI.

hardware.label: Hardware
hardware.title: The Legal Black Box.
hardware.description: Instead of selling a software license, we physically install a machine at your premises. Your data doesn't go to the Cloud. It stays in this box, under lock and key.

localFirst.title: Local-First & Sovereign
localFirst.description: Isolated architecture. Your files never leave.

neuralPower.title: M4 Neural Power
neuralPower.description: A "Resident Intern" on dedicated AI chip.

methodology.title: Technology Masterbuilder
methodology.description: We don't leave you alone with a machine. Our methodology transforms the device into a proactive collaborator.

audit.title: Audit
audit.description: Diagnosis of the firm's "zombie tasks". Identification of time wasted sorting emails to prepare the "Assistant" module.

installation.title: Installation
installation.description: Delivery of the Archilo Box. Configuration of secure channels (Signal/WhatsApp) and selection of local reasoning models.

training.title: Training
training.description: Local Knowledge Management. The Box scans your archives to build a "memory" of precedents and learns your style.

production.title: Production
production.description: Launch of the "24/7 Intern". Activation of proactive routines (Night Watch, Morning Summaries) and workflow automation.

stagiaire.title: The AI Intern in Action
stagiaire.description: The device comes to life through daily routines that transform your practice.

morningBriefing.title: Morning Briefing
morningBriefing.description: Every morning at 8:00 AM, the Box sends a summary of hearings, urgent emails, and relevant legal news.

secureConversation.title: Secure Conversation
secureConversation.description: You don't change apps. Talk to your Box via Telegram, Signal, or WhatsApp. It responds like a human.

nightShift.title: The Night Shift
nightShift.description: The Box works at night. Analysis of large documents and case law monitoring delivered ready the next morning.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know before taking the leap.

q1.question: Why a Mac mini and not another server?
q1.answer: The Mac mini M4 integrates a neural chip (NPU) dedicated to artificial intelligence. It's currently the best power/consumption/silence ratio on the market for running AI models locally. It consumes less than 50W, makes no noise, and fits in the palm of your hand.

q2.question: Does my data really stay with me?
q2.answer: Yes, that's the fundamental principle of Archilo. The machine is physically installed at your firm. Your files, emails, and documents never pass through our servers or any external cloud. All AI processing happens locally on the M4 chip.

q3.question: Is it compliant with GDPR and attorney-client privilege?
q3.answer: Absolutely. Since your data never leaves your premises, you maintain full control over its processing. There's no transfer to third parties, eliminating risks associated with cloud subcontractors. It's the safest solution for respecting attorney-client privilege.

q4.question: How does AI work without internet connection?
q4.answer: The AI models are installed directly on the Box. They run locally, without needing internet for processing. A connection is only needed for updates and certain optional features (external case law monitoring, for example).

q5.question: What happens if the machine breaks down?
q5.answer: We include a 2-year hardware warranty and priority technical support. In case of failure, we intervene within 48 hours with a replacement machine. Your data is backed up locally on a separate encrypted drive.

q6.question: Can I use my usual apps (Outlook, Word)?
q6.answer: Yes. The Archilo Box integrates with your existing environment. You continue using your usual tools. The AI communicates with you via Telegram, Signal, or WhatsApp. You don't have to change your habits or install complex new software.
